para_trans: Hon'ble Deputy Speaker, Maharashtra Legislative Assembly
Reference: - 1) Government Decision, No.Shaniva-1525 / Q.No.104 / Niwas-2, D. On the 25th of April, 2025
2) Government Decision, No.-Shaniva-1520 / Q. 15/23 -A, D. January 09, 2020
Mr. Anna Dadu Bansode, Hon'ble Deputy Speaker, Maharashtra Legislative Assembly as "C-3 (Purandar)" Madam Cama

The government has decided to allot a government bungalow, Marg, Mumbai. Hence, the Government Residence at Churchgate, "Suniti-9," made under the Government Decision in Article No. 1, referred to him.
The allotment is now being cancelled.

As per the provision of the Government Decision in the relevant Article No. 2, the residence allotted to the Hon'ble Vice-Chairman after his discharge from office shall be liable to be vacated within a period of fifteen days.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
